living-concrete.pattern: 1. Extract PURPOSE from spec (why does this exist?) 2. Identify CONCEPTS (what mental models needed?) 3. Map DETAILS (how does it work?) 4. Select EXAMPLES (what shows it best?) 5. Build NAVIGATION (how does it connect?)
- Snippet before explanation (show then tell) - Annotations inline or immediately after - Complete examples at chapter end - Running example thread when possible
living-concrete.antipattern: Simplifying until incorrect. Find the simple-AND-accurate framing.
Reformatting spec without transformation. Chapters must teach, not just restate.
